keyword_frequency.name: You may choose not to untap CARDNAME during your untap step.
CARDNAME must be blocked if able.
All creatures able to block CARDNAME do so.
A deck can have any number of cards named CARDNAME.
Remove CARDNAME from your deck before playing if you're not playing for ante.
CARDNAME can't attack or block alone.
Prevent all damage that would be dealt to CARDNAME.
CARDNAME can block creatures with shadow as though they didn't have shadow.
Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt to CARDNAME.
After you roll a die, you may pay 1 life. If you do, increase or decrease the result by 1. Do this only once each turn.
After you roll a die, you may remove a +1/+1 counter from Xenosquirrels. If you do, increase or decrease the result by 1.
As an additional cost to cast creature spells, you may pay any amount of mana. If you do, that creature enters with that many additional +1/+1 counters on it.
Before drawing your opening hand, choose 1, 2, or 3.
CARDNAME can't attack unless a black or green creature also attacks.
CARDNAME can't attack unless a creature with greater power also attacks.
CARDNAME can't attack unless at least two other creatures attack.
CARDNAME can't be destroyed by lethal damage unless lethal damage dealt by a single source is marked on it.
CARDNAME can't block unless a creature with greater power also blocks.
CARDNAME can't block unless at least two other creatures block.
CARDNAME must be blocked by exactly one creature if able.
CARDNAME must be blocked by two or more creatures if able.
If CARDNAME is unblocked, you may have it assign its combat damage to a creature defending player controls.
Once each turn, you may pay {1} to reroll one or more dice you rolled.
Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt to and dealt by CARDNAME.
Spend only colored mana on X. No more than one mana of each color may be spent this way.
The number of loyalty counters on CARDNAME is equal to the number of Beebles you control.
While you're searching your library, you may cast CARDNAME from your library.
You may assign CARDNAME's combat damage divided as you choose among defending player and/or any number of creatures they control.
Your deck can't have basic land cards.
Your minimum deck size is reduced by five.
Your starting hand size is five.
